us,ut,uu,uv,uw,ux,uy,uz,va,vb,vc,vd,ve,vf,vg ut={} ux={-21711,-20354,-21759,-52852,-32548,-16157,-51658,-20080,-24826,-53660,-13182,-22453,-10950,-33720,-38245,-106} uu=function(vh) local vi=ux[vh] local vj=(vh*2864)%4096 local vk=((vi+vj)-662)+uw ut[vh*131071+uw]=vk return vk end uv=0 us=uv uw=uv uw=uw*8+(37809) uv=us+(ut[15*131071+uw] or uu(15)) us=uv repeat if us>=777 then if us==777 then vb=vb+vd uz=vb uw=uw*19+(-389573) uv=us+(ut[2*131071+uw] or uu(2)) us=uv elseif us==781 then ve=ve+vg va=ve uw=uw*21+(-181430) uv=us+(ut[10*131071+uw] or uu(10)) us=uv elseif us==785 then or yf(41)) end else yh=0 yd=1088 end end end end else yh=0 yd=1088 end else yh=0 yd=1088 end end end if yd==945 then break end until false end eq=function(zi,zj) local ber={-40924,-47675,-27215,-21463,-21765,-49035,-48056,-35729,-28561,-28617,-48157,-31916,-39792,-45505,-24047,-40670,-40510,-45239,-56144,-26109,-29735,-4736,-18057,-42545,-28030,-17351,-30993,-36262,-10321,-6582,-58801,-37030,-29826,-1793} if bh==788 then bn[35]=function(epk) local epl,epm,epn,epo,epp,epq,epr epm={} epn=function(eps,ept,epu) local epv=((eps+ept)-epu)+epp epm[eps*131071+epp]=epv return epv end epo=0 epl=epo epp=epo epp=epp*12+(44997) epl=epl+(epm[538418*131071+epp] or epn(538418,1494,3241)) repeat if epl<=581668 then if epl==581668 then epq,epr=bn[2][18][6](epk,bn[20],bn[20]+1) end;bl=bl*22+(-1173638) bh=bh+(bi[50*131071+bl] or bj(50)) elseif bh==780 then bn[31]=1 bn[32]=nil bn[32]=function(epw) local epx,epy,epz,eqa,eqb,eqc,eqd,eqe,eqf epy={} epz=function(eqg,eqh,eqi) local eqj=((eqh-eqi)+eqg)+eqb epy[eqg*131071+eqb]=eqj return eqj end eqa=0 epx=eqa eqb=eqa eqb=eqb*26+(32172) eqa=epx+(epy[493308*131071+eqb] or epz(493308,2755,305)) epx=eqa repeat if epx==527930 then eqc,eqd,eqe,eqf=bn[2][18][6](epw,bn[20],bn[20]+bn[2][26][4]) bn[20]=bn[20]+bn[2][46][5];return((eqf*16777216)+(eqe*65536)+(eqd*256)+eqc);elseif epx==527949 then eqa=epy[eqb*131071+10] or epx bn[37]=nil bn[31]=bn[36] do local eqk,eql=i(bn[19],bn[31]),(bn[31])+(1) bn[37]=eqk bn[31]=eql end bn[2][46][2]=(((bn[37])-(bn[2][15][5]))+(bn[2][4]))+(28443434) if not(((bn[2][3][3]) and(bn[2][3][1]))) then bl=bl*12+(-702484) bh=bh+(bi[4*131071+bl] or bj(4)) else bl=bl*22+(-1247650) bh=bh+(bi[5*131071+bl] or bj(5)) end else bl=0 bh=1142 end end end end else if bh>=764 then if end),setmetatable,next,(table.unpack or unpack),nil,math.min,(function(eqv) local eqw,eqx,eqy,eqz,era,erb,erc eqx={}
